reasoning_summary: Although a taint path exists from Intent extra to Runtime.exec(), the Service is protected by a signature-level permission. Only apps signed with the same certificate can invoke this component, preventing exploitation by third-party malicious apps.
evidence_for: Taint path from getStringExtra to Runtime.exec is confirmed
No input validation or sanitizer on the command string
evidence_against: Only same-signature apps can invoke this service
Signature permissions cannot be bypassed without the signing key
